config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLimit:
Set the maximum number of particles
for each ParticleRenderType.
config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLight:
Weather to enable particle
light cache.
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncAnimatio: Execution mode for async animation tick.
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncParticle: Execution mode for async particle tick.
config.asyncparticles.tick.failPerSecLim:
Set the maximum number of
ticking failures per second
for each particle class or end tick operation.
If exceeded, handle according to the
behavior specified in 'Fail Behavior' option.
Set the behavior
when the fail per second limit is exceeded.
config.asyncparticles.tick.suppressCME.t:
Whether to suppress
ConcurrentModificationException (under fail limit)
config.asyncparticles.rendering.asyncPar:
Wether to enable async
particle rendering.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failPerS:
Set the maximum number of
rendering failures per second
for each particle class. If exceeded,
handle according to the behavior specified
in 'Fail Behavior' option.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failBeha:
Set the behavior
when the fail per second limit is exceeded.
config.asyncparticles.mod-compat.valkyri:
Set the condition for spawning
rain effects on Valkyrien Skies's ships.

Whether to fix
particle lights on Valkyrien Skies's ships.
Set the condition for spawning
rain effects on Create's contraptions.
config.asyncparticles.error.cloth-config:
Please install Cloth Config API
to access the config menu.
